input.background: How large a sample is needed to test the oat bran data presented earlier in the chapter with 80% power at α=0.05 two sided? We want to detect a mean change of 0.2 mmol/L and will assume a standard deviation of 0.4 mmol/L.
input.question: Determine if an adjustment factor f is needed when the sample size exceeds 30.

output.answer: Because the sample size exceeds 30, there is no need to apply adjustment factor f.

meta_info.caption: Sample size requirement, paired-t test (Oat bran).
